title: Intelica – competitive intelligence API that charges AI agents $0.05 via x402
abstract: Intelica – competitive intelligence API that charges AI agents $0.05 via x402 is an AI agent framework that autonomously plans tasks, calls tools, and executes multi-step workflows. Set the goal, and ...
abstract_zh: AI小伙伴们！给你们安利个超赞的小工具——Intelica！这货简直就是效率提升的秘密武器，只需$0.05就能让你的AI小伙伴瞬间变身情报高手。写周报时，它能帮你快速收集竞争对手的信息；调Bug时，它能提供精准的市场情报。简直是神助攻啊！快试试吧，让工作变得轻松又有趣！
